title: Practice Admin Location Create Scaffold
goal: Add a minimal /practice/admin scaffold that shows and creates practice_locations for the selected menu so later action-node, ingredient-path, and step-group authoring has valid location IDs without touching runtime/store/session helper boundaries.
constraints: Keep menuView.ts, sessionView.ts, adminView.ts, runtime.ts, practiceStore.ts, and types/practice.ts unchanged unless a concrete blocker is proven.
Add practice_locations write helpers only in src/lib/practice/queries.ts; do not introduce DB writes in Zustand or page-level direct Supabase calls.
Do not add delete flow, recipe node authoring, or step-group authoring in this slice.
Treat docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md, docs/worker/LEARNINGS.md, and docs/worker/MISTAKES.md as allowed auxiliary files per CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md.
acceptance: Selected menu on /practice/admin shows current practice_locations from the existing bundle read path, with a clean empty state when the menu has zero locations.
Admins can create a practice location with label and loc_key for the selected menu even when that menu currently has zero locations.
After successful create, the selected menu bundle refreshes or remains in sync so the new location is immediately visible without breaking existing menu create, metadata edit, or drilldown behavior.
PracticeMenuPage, PracticeSessionPage, practice runtime/store boundaries, and sim routes/pages remain behaviorally unchanged.
Phase 4 follows build -> lint -> @self-reviewer -> tsc, and only the documented pre-existing warnings are allowed.
